name: Coconut Puddin'pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and confectioners sugar until very light and lemon-colored.
2. Add the egg yolks one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in the vanilla and evaporated milk.
4. In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites until foamy.
5. Gradually add salt to the egg whites, beating until stiff but not dry.
6. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the butter mixture.
7. Carefully fold in 1-1/2 cups of the grated coconut.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pie shell and sprinkle with ground nutmeg.
9. Scatter the remaining coconut on top.
10. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for about 35 minutes, or until set.
11. Serve warm or cold.
